title: Alternate 3D Swords
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4t9WyF45/images/6736569525a3f84f8bd22dce021fb06d24971c3a.png) **Works without mods!** Give your swords some 3D flair with these custom models for every sword! Resource pack contains only the swords' textures, so it should work with any other resource pack as long as you make sure this is on top in the resource pack menu! If you have [CIT resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) or **Optifine** installed you can rename a Netherite Sword to Master Sword for a surprise :) report any issues you have on the website! --- please do not redistribute without my consent (feel free to use in modrinth or curseforge modpacks though!)
if you make variations from this please credit me :]
